name: plugin-improver
description: Audit, tune, and evolve Claude Code and Codex plugins - and curate the whole skill+plugin inventory: score plugin health, sharpen trigger descriptions, repair lifecycle hooks, run non-regressing improvement passes, and detect skill sprawl, trigger collisions, duplicate installs, and plugin version drift across Claude Code and Codex.

interface.longDescription: Plugin Improver gives Codex authors a disciplined loop for making plugins better. It scores plugin health, tunes skill triggers, repairs lifecycle hooks, and runs bounded improvement passes with regression checks and context-cost discipline. Its skill-curator skill widens the lens to the whole inventory: skill sprawl, trigger collisions, duplicate installs, and source-vs-cache plugin version drift across Codex and Claude.
defaultPrompt: Use $plugin-audit to score the plugin in this folder.
Use $plugin-improve to run one improvement pass on my plugin.
Use $plugin-hooks to add a SessionStart hook to my plugin.
Use $plugin-tune-triggers to fix a skill that never fires.
Use $skill-curator to find sprawl, collisions, and version drift across my skills and plugins.
Use $plugin-scaffold to create a new dual-harness plugin from scratch.
Use $plugin-release to package and publish my plugin to both marketplaces.
